test.notes: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml, and the mission guidance for this refactoring milestone says no E2E tests are needed.

typecheck.notes: Per mission AGENTS.md, root type checking is validated through the build pipeline rather than a separate tsc command; the build log includes @documenso/remix running react-router typegen && tsc.

lint.notes: Lint exited 0 with warnings only across @documenso/trpc, @documenso/ui, and @documenso/lib; no errors blocked the milestone validators.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that exported TTL cache invalidation helpers should also be wired into the obvious mutation paths when those writes live in the same codebase, not merely exported for future callers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for server-cache-team-settings and server-cache-webhooks both found bounded staleness because packages/trpc/server/team-router/update-team-settings.ts does not call clearTeamSettingsCache(teamId), and packages/lib/server-only/webhooks/create-webhook.ts, edit-webhook.ts, and delete-webhook-by-id.ts do not call clearWebhookCache(). By contrast, packages/lib/server-only/site-settings/upsert-site-setting.ts already calls clearSiteSettingsCache().

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify VAL-SERVER-002 so it describes caching by teamId plus access context (userId when present) rather than teamId alone, preventing future refactors from broadening the key in a way that bypasses user-scoped authorization semantics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: packages/lib/server-only/team/get-team-settings.ts computes the cache key as `${teamId}:${userId ?? ''}` to preserve the function's optional userId access check, while the current feature description and validation contract describe the cache as keyed only by teamId.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand the request-level memoization guidance to say the per-Request cache should store the in-flight Promise, not only the resolved value, so concurrent calls on the same Request deduplicate correctly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both packages/auth/server/lib/utils/get-session.ts and packages/trpc/server/trpc.ts use WeakMap<Request, ...> caches that store Promise values. The current mission guidance only says to use a WeakMap keyed on Request, which omits the concurrency-critical promise-caching detail.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document why site settings uses a 60-second TTL while team settings and webhook caches use 30-second TTLs.
Document that mapRequestToContextForCookie is now centralized inside resolveSession for getSession/getOptionalSession wrappers.
